problem id: 5d193826
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10110010 -> 01100001
  10010101 -> 00101110
  11100111 -> 11001001
  01011110 -> 10111110
  11001000 -> 10010110
  01111111 -> 11111101
  01010011 -> 10100100
  10011100 -> 00111100

query: 00001000
predicted answer: 00010000
